----

== 이벤트 흐름 표

[cols="2,3,3", options="header"]
|===
| 이벤트 | 발행 주체 | 소비 주체

| `NotificationJobCreatedEvent`
| CreateScheduledNotificationJobUseCase
| NotificationJobCreatedProcessor (Processor)

| `NotificationJobExecutionEvent`
| ProcessingNotificationJobExecutionScheduler +
RetryingNotificationJobExecutionScheduler
| NotificationJobExecutionProcessor (Processor)

| `NotificationJobScheduleEvent`
| CancelNotificationJobUseCase +
NotificationJobCreatedProcessor +
NotificationJobSendOrchestrator
| NotificationJobScheduleProcessor (Processor)

| `NotificationJobStatusChangedEvent`
| RecoverNotificationJobUseCase +
DbScheduledNotificationJobRelay +
DbRetryScheduledNotificationRecoverRelay +
StuckProcessingRecoveryScheduler +
CancelNotificationJobUseCase +
RetryingNotificationJobExecutionScheduler
| NotificationJobStatusChangedProcessor (Processor)

| `NotificationReadEvent`
| ReadNotificationUseCase
| NotificationReadProcessor (Processor)

|===

== 이벤트 체인

Processor가 다른 이벤트를 발행하는 경우, 이벤트 체인이 형성됩니다.

* `NotificationJobCreatedEvent` → *NotificationJobCreatedProcessor* → `NotificationJobScheduleEvent`
